ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
The Tasks plugin is not supported in Live Preview.
Please use reading mode.
ast.target: 任务插件在实时预览模式下不受支持。\n请使用阅读模式。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Only uses cache when a file Live Preview tab is open. If both reading view and Live Preview are opened this feature is disabled.
ast.target: 仅在文件实时预览标签页打开时使用缓存。如果阅读视图和实时预览都已打开，则此功能将被禁用。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: EXPERIMENTAL:
ast.target: 实验性：

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Sets the defalut behavior when determining whether to align table to text alignment.
ast.target: 设置在确定是否将表格与文本对齐时的默认行为。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: This may take a while for large vaults, you can continue to use Obsidian but application may slow down during process.
ast.target: 对于大型知识库，这可能需要一些时间，您可以继续使用Obsidian，但在此过程中应用程序可能会变慢。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: WARNING:
ast.target: 警告：

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: This action modifies any note file with depricated syntax and could lead to corrupted file text.
ast.target: 此操作会修改任何包含已弃用语法的笔记文件，并可能导致文件文本损坏。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: No guarentee is given. Please make sure to back your vault up first.
ast.target: 不提供任何保证。请确保先备份您的知识库。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: This will only modify column regions without a pre-defined ID, and which use the up to date core syntax. Will not modify depricated syntax or fenced-divs.
ast.target: 此操作仅修改没有预定义ID且使用最新核心语法的列区域。不会修改已弃用的语法或围栏式div。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: This action modifies any note file missing column IDs and could lead to corrupted file text.
ast.target: 此操作会修改任何缺少列ID的笔记文件，并可能导致文件文本损坏。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error. Something went wrong parsing column break out of text.
ast.target: 错误。解析文本中的列分隔符时出现问题。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error: Checkbox not of proper type
ast.target: 错误：复选框类型不正确

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error: Checkbox is missing proper class.
ast.target: 错误：复选框缺少正确的类。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error: OnClick aready defined, not overwriting method.
ast.target: 错误：OnClick已定义，未覆盖方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not find text in provided document.
ast.target: 在提供的文档中找不到文本。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not update file. File does not contain region text.
ast.target: 无法更新文件。文件不包含区域文本。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Found undefined codeblock data when exporting.
ast.target: 导出时发现未定义的代码块数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you like this Plugin, please consider providing a one time donation to support it's development.
ast.target: 如果您喜欢此插件，请考虑提供一次性捐赠以支持其开发。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Number of auto-layout balance iterations
ast.target: 自动布局平衡迭代次数

ast.name: setName

ast.target: 默认按文本对齐方式对齐表格

ast.name: setName

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Update ALL depricated Multi-Column syntax.
ast.target: 更新所有已弃用的多列语法。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Append IDs to all Multi-Column regions in vault.
ast.target: 为保险库中所有多列区域追加ID。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Error parsing column layout or width, defaulting to standard layout.
ast.target: 解析列布局或宽度时出错，已恢复为标准布局。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Found null DOM manager. Could not process multi-column markdown.
ast.target: 发现空DOM管理器。无法处理多列Markdown。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Encountered an error inserting a multi-column region. Please try again later.
ast.target: 插入多列区域时遇到错误。请稍后再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Found 0 missing IDs in the current document.
ast.target: 在当前文档中发现0个缺失的ID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Encountered an error addign IDs to multi-column regions. Please try again later.
ast.target: 为多列区域添加ID时遇到错误。请稍后再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Found no region syntax to update.
ast.target: 未发现需要更新的区域语法。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Encountered an error fixing multi-column region syntax. Please try again later.
ast.target: 修复多列区域语法时遇到错误。请稍后再试。
